_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: Autophagic flux was significantly higher in NF1−/− cells (ipNF95.11b 'C' and ipNF05.5) relative to NF1+/− controls
details: Showed significantly higher autophagic flux relative to NF1+/- controls
